title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: Mamdani Breaks Promise to Far Left, Admits He Cannot Arrest Netanyahu
stories.summary:
Mamdani Breaks Promise to Far Left, Admits He Cannot Arrest Netanyahu. New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video to social media on Tuesday conceding that he has no authority to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu — a promise he made to the far left and terrorist sympathizers to gain their support.

The post Mamdani Breaks Promise to Far Left, Admits He Cannot Arrest Netanyahu appeared first o. BBC: Mamdani backs off pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority.

BBC reports that the New York City mayor instead called on US authorities to act on International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

links.headline: Mamdani backs off pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority
links.excerpt: The New York City mayor instead called on US authorities to act on International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

stories.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
stories.summary:
Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran. The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

Al Jazeera: Iran war live: US kills 2, wounds 11; Houthis attack 2 Saudi oil tankers.

Al Jazeera reports that uS and Iran trade attacks as more explosions are reported in Iranian cities, including Sirik, Ahvaz and Bushehr.

stories.title: Jim Jordan urges criminal charges against Jack Smith over alleged perjury
stories.summary:
Jim Jordan urges criminal charges against Jack Smith over alleged perjury. House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan (R-OH) on Wednesday issued a criminal referral of former special counsel Jack Smith to the Department of Justice over allegations he lied to Congress about tracking personal phone messages of dozens of lawmakers.

Republicans have long raised concerns about Smith’s time at President Joe Biden’s DOJ. Smith obtained subpoenas […].

Fox News: Jack Smith hit with criminal referral as GOP moves testimony fight toward prosecution. Fox News reports that jim Jordan issued a criminal referral against Jack Smith, accusing him of making false statements to Congress about accessing lawmakers' text messages.

stories.title: Only 2 Left: Maine Democrats Remove Transgender Candidate Ashley Webb, Others as Options for Senate
stories.summary:
Only 2 Left: Maine Democrats Remove Transgender Candidate Ashley Webb, Others as Options for Senate.

Maine Democrats have removed transgender candidate Ashley Webb – vying to replace scandal-plagued Graham Platner in the state's Senate race – and others from their website under listed candidates, leaving only two who they say meet the qualifications to participate in the Maine Democrat Party’s U.S. Senate Nominating Convention.

stories.summary: Aussie captain relishes 'special' chance 'to take time to be a dad'. stories.summary:
Red Kiss – guiding vampires through a blood-soaked cold war Berlin.

Inspired by interactive theatre and fuelled by the motion capture tech used by VTubers, the vampire spies in Red Kiss have personality in spades ‘You look at the news and you’re like, ‘Another pointless war, another pointless bloodshed, another pointless genocide.’ And that can make you a bit hopeless.” Roy van der Schilden, narrative designer and business director at Wispfire, speaks of a very human feeling.

But the protagonist of its upcoming game Red Kiss can relate – despite b.

stories.title: Inside the horrifying online network where children coerce others to commit violence and self-harm
stories.summary:
Inside the horrifying online network where children coerce others to commit violence and self-harm. The 764 network is just one part of a growing online ecosystem that pushes young members into brutal and degrading acts.

It has perpetrators and victims in dozens of countries In late 2024, in a quiet suburb of Stockholm, a 14-year-old boy approached a man in his 80s who was using a walker.

He stabbed the man three times in the back. The video of the attack in Hässelby was streamed and spread quickly.

It fed a global online ecosystem that actively encourages and glorifies acts of.

stories.title: Bub – living an artist’s dreams and dreads in New York
stories.summary:
Bub – living an artist’s dreams and dreads in New York. An autobiographical game about the devastating effects of chronic illness on an artist’s creative life gives players the chance to slow the pace right down Bub does not look like a traditional video game.

Artist and stop-motion animator Case Jernigan spends hours, days, months in his studio drawing, painting and delicately cutting out pieces of collected paper, while coder and gameplay designer Todd Anderson builds scripts and physics simulations to make them into a game. <p.

stories.title: ‘We were at their mercy’: inside the Amazon tactics that hiked prices across the internet
stories.summary:
‘We were at their mercy’: inside the Amazon tactics that hiked prices across the internet. Internal emails revealed in court and interviews with ex-employees describe how Amazon’s practices drove up prices for competitors like Walmart and Target.

Amazon denies price-fixing claims and says it works to lower costs for consumers A “modern leather” table lamp, listed online at Walmart, shot up from $24.99 to $39. The price of an air fryer on a retail site called Newegg went from $84.99 to $149.99.

An electric ice-cream maker was listed at just $17.99 at Amazon and B.

stories.title: Legarda calls for stronger action as child stunting rises
stories.summary:
Legarda calls for stronger action as child stunting rises.

MANILA, Philippines — No education reform can fully succeed while Filipino children continue to suffer from chronic malnutrition during their earliest years, Sen. Loren Legarda said in a statement issued on Tuesday as she called for stronger government action to fight child stunting.

Legarda called for stronger coordination among national government agencies, local government units, schools,.

stories.title: Northern Samar seeks limits on gadget use by students in schools
stories.summary:
Northern Samar seeks limits on gadget use by students in schools. TACLOBAN CITY- The provincial government of Northern Samar is pushing for a policy on the use of mobile phones and other electronic devices in public and private elementary and secondary schools during class hours.

The officials cited concerns over distractions, cyberbullying, cheating, and exposure to inappropriate online content. The proposed “Provincial Learner Focus and Digital Wellness.

stories.title: Angat Dam’s water level dips further below critical mark
stories.summary:
Angat Dam’s water level dips further below critical mark. MANILA, Philippines — The Angat Dam recorded 151.45 meters above sea level (masl) on Thursday, July 23, dipping further below the 160-meter critical water level threshold, the state weather bureau reported.

According to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa), the reservoir fell 0.67 meters from Wednesday’s 152.12 masl. The Angat Dam’s water.

stories.title: Government’s flagship one-stop shop launched in Maguindanao
stories.summary:
Government’s flagship one-stop shop launched in Maguindanao. MANILA, Philippines — President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. on Wednesday launched the Bangsamoro Convergence Program at Maguindanao del Norte.

The program gathers all government services in one stop to deliver frontline government assistance across the region.

The national government turned over P3.4 billion in projects and assistance to the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM).

stories.title: Disaster council seeks extension of Cagayan state of calamity
stories.summary:
Disaster council seeks extension of Cagayan state of calamity. TUGUEGARAO CITY-The Provincial Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (PDRRMC) has recommended the extension of the state of calamity in Cagayan province until December 31 because of lingering El Niño drought.

Cesar Cuntapay, PDRRMO officer-in-charge, said the resolution was transmitted to the Cagayan provincial board on Thursday, urging it to retain the state of calamity.

stories.title: If you pay a hacker’s ransom, chances are that they’ll come back for more
stories.summary: If you pay a hacker’s ransom, chances are that they’ll come back for more. The long-held understanding among security researchers and network defenders is that it's impossible to negotiate in good faith with an extortion racket because there's no incentive for the other side to actually walk away.

stories.title: Splatoon Raiders review – Nintendo’s inky shooter fades to grey
stories.summary:
Splatoon Raiders review – Nintendo’s inky shooter fades to grey.

Nintendo Switch 2 The single-player offshoot of the quirky and colourful multiplayer series is disappointingly run-of-the-mill Splatoon is among Nintendo’s most ingenious inventions of the last decade: a series of shooting games whose paint-splattered turf war nature means being bad at shooting is just as valuable as – if not more so than – being good.

It is also blessed with an abundance of personality, with vibrant characters, a richly imagined world, and a hipness.
